questionHtml: Justify why it is inappropriate to record the uncertainty of the mean as ±0.01 s.
markschemeHtml:
variation of individual values is much greater «than this uncertainty»

OR

«uncertainty» does not take into account «student» reaction time

[1 mark]

meta.title: Justify why it is inappropriate to record the uncertainty of the mean as ±0.01 s.
breadcrumbLabels: 11.1 Uncertainties and errors in measurement and results
